Pseudo-Elements Test Fixture

::before and ::after with content

Star-decorated text

A wise saying goes here

This paragraph has a bold red prefix via ::before.

display:block pseudo-element

This paragraph has a blue left border created by a ::before pseudo-element with display:block and absolute positioning.

Another block-pseudo paragraph with the same blue accent bar.

Decorative pseudo-element

This box has a subtle "SAMPLE" watermark label in the top-right corner via ::after.
